name: Turncoat Cape
description: Notes This armor gives high DEF for a UT leather armor along with a huge SPD boost, fully outclassing all Beehemoth Armors, making it highly effective for rushing. Its ability to grant a short-lived invisibility period when damaged enough further amplifies these strengths, giving the user unprecedented evasiveness and mobility.
effects: On taking over 30 damage: Invisible for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds
